name: MicroWars 2
author: Poki
description: MicroWars 2 is the sequel to the strategy game MicroWars! Deploy your troops strategically to capture neutral cells and convert them to your side. Launch attacks on your enemies, overpower their forces, and dominate the battlefield to claim the entire map as yours. With every move counting, can you outsmart your opponents and emerge victorious in MicroWars 2? How to play MicroWars 2? Move the mouse cursor and drag a line from one base to another to send troops. Who created MicroWars 2? MicroWars 2 is created by Okashi Games. Play their other games on Poki: Kawaii Fruits 3D , Karakuri , MicroWars , Rolling Jump , Nano War and Park Out ! How can I play MicroWars 2 for free? You can play MicroWars 2 for free on Poki. Can I play MicroWars 2 on mobile devices and desktop? MicroWars 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
